import json, codecs, os, sys, re, unicodedata, difflib, math, statistics, pprint

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"
print(os.path.exists(quran_path), os.path.exists(hadith_path))

with open(quran_path, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

type(quran)
len(quran), type(quran[0]), quran[0].keys()

import re, unicodedata

# Arabic diacritics regex
arabic_diacritics = re.compile(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u0670\u06D6-\u06DC\u06DF-\u06E8\u06EA-\u06ED]')
tatweel = '\u0640'

def normalize_ar(s):
    if s is None:
        return ''
    # unify hamza forms? We'll map different hamza to simple forms maybe to alif?
    # We'll map all alif variants to bare alif: أإآا -> ا
    s0 = s
    s = s.replace(tatweel, '')
    s = arabic_diacritics.sub('', s)
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r'[^\w\s]', ' ', s, flags=re.UNICODE)  # replace punct with space
    # unify hamza/alif
    mapping = {
        'أ':'ا','إ':'ا','آ':'ا','ٱ':'ا','ى':'ي','ؤ':'و','ئ':'ي','ء':'', 'ٰ':'', 'ۃ':'ه','ة':'ه',
    }
    s = ''.join(mapping.get(ch, ch) for ch in s)
    # remove extra spaces
    s = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip().lower()
    return s

def lcs_ratio(a,b):
    # compute length of LCS normalized by max length
    from difflib import SequenceMatcher
    sm = SequenceMatcher(None, a, b)
    return sm.ratio()

# We'll also define token F1 
def token_f1(a,b):
    ta = set(a.split())
    tb = set(b.split())
    if not ta and not tb:
        return 1.0
    if not ta or not tb:
        return 0.0
    inter = len(ta & tb)
    prec = inter / len(ta) if ta else 0
    rec = inter / len(tb) if tb else 0
    if prec+rec == 0:
        return 0.0
    f1 = 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)
    return f1

pattern = "وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِن قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا"
matches = [v for v in quran if pattern in v['ayah_text']]

occ = [v for v in quran if "عَضُدًا" in v['ayah_text'] or "عَضَدًا" in v['ayah_text'] or "عضدا" in normalize_ar(v['ayah_text'])]
len(occ), [(v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text']) for v in occ]

def sim(a,b):
    aN, bN = norm(a), norm(b)
    return lcs_ratio(aN,bN), token_f1(aN,bN)

cands_list = []
for v in quran:
    # evaluate on all verses with any of the words

    if lcs > 0.3:  # threshold low to view near matches

# sort by lcs descending then f1
cands_sorted = sorted(cands_list, key=lambda x: (x[0], x[1]), reverse=True)
[(round(lcs,3), round(f1,3), (v['surah_id'], v['ayah_id'], v['ayah_text'])) for (lcs,f1,v) in cands_sorted[:10]]

def contains_tokens(text, tokens):
    t = normalize_ar(text)
    return all(tok in t for tok in tokens)

tokens = [normalize_ar("وَلَقَدْ أَرْسَلْنَا مِنْ قَبْلِكَ رُسُلًا").split(),
